data.title: TLS/SSL Encryption
data.description: Strong encryption methods secure user data in transit.

data.title: Web Application Firewall (WAF)
data.description: A WAF to protect against common web-based attacks.
data.technical_spec: Possibly utilizing Cloudflare or an in-house firewall solution.

data.title: Automated Vulnerability Scans
data.description: Regular security scans to identify and mitigate vulnerabilities promptly.
data.technical_spec: Services like Qualys or Nessus could be in use.

data.title: Secure APIs
data.description: APIs are secured with token-based authentication mechanisms.
data.technical_spec: OAuth 2.0 and JSON Web Tokens for secure API transactions.

data.title: DDoS Protection
data.description: Robust systems in place to mitigate Distributed Denial of Service attacks.
data.technical_spec: Traffic filtering and diversion techniques possibly powered by Akamai Prolexic or AWS Shield.
